description_fr: Plats du monde, gastronomie française, vins, spiritueux. Pour les épicuriens.
description_en: World dishes, French gastronomy, wines, spirits. For food and drink lovers.

questions.question_fr: Quel pays est l'origine de la pizza ?
questions.question_en: Which country is the origin of pizza?
questions.explanation_fr: La pizza moderne est née à Naples, Italie, au XVIIIe siècle.
questions.explanation_en: Modern pizza originated in Naples, Italy, in the 18th century.

questions.question_fr: Quel cépage est principalement utilisé pour le Bordeaux rouge ?
questions.question_en: Which grape is mainly used for red Bordeaux?
questions.explanation_fr: Le Cabernet Sauvignon est le cépage roi des Bordeaux rouges (souvent assemblé avec du Merlot).
questions.explanation_en: Cabernet Sauvignon is the king grape of red Bordeaux (often blended with Merlot).

questions.question_fr: Le sushi vient à l'origine de Chine, pas du Japon.
questions.question_en: Sushi originally comes from China, not Japan.
questions.explanation_fr: Le narezushi (ancêtre du sushi) vient du sud-est asiatique. Le Japon l'a perfectionné.
questions.explanation_en: Narezushi (sushi's ancestor) comes from Southeast Asia. Japan perfected it.

questions.question_fr: Quel est l'ingrédient principal du houmous ?
questions.question_en: What is the main ingredient in hummus?
questions.explanation_fr: Le houmous est à base de pois chiches, sésame (tahini), citron et ail.
questions.explanation_en: Hummus is made with chickpeas, sesame (tahini), lemon, and garlic.

questions.question_fr: À quelle température cuit-on un steak 'bleu' (très saignant) ?
questions.question_en: At what core temperature is a 'blue' (very rare) steak cooked?
questions.explanation_fr: Un bleu est saisi rapidement, cœur tiède à 35-38°C.
questions.explanation_en: Blue steak is briefly seared, with a warm core at 35-38°C.

questions.question_fr: Le vin pétillant produit en Champagne s'appelle le ___.
questions.question_en: Sparkling wine produced in Champagne is called ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Seul le vin de la région Champagne (France) peut s'appeler Champagne (AOC).
questions.explanation_en: Only wine from the Champagne region (France) can be called Champagne (AOC).

questions.question_fr: Quel pays a inventé la fondue au fromage ?
questions.explanation_fr: La fondue au fromage est née en Suisse au XVIIIe siècle.
questions.explanation_en: Cheese fondue originated in Switzerland in the 18th century.

questions.question_fr: Le wasabi vert servi dans les restaurants de sushi est souvent du raifort coloré.
questions.question_en: The green wasabi served in sushi restaurants is often dyed horseradish.
questions.explanation_fr: Le vrai wasabi est rare et cher. La plupart des restaurants servent du raifort + colorant + moutarde.
questions.explanation_en: Real wasabi is rare and expensive. Most restaurants serve horseradish + dye + mustard.

questions.question_fr: Quel alcool sert de base au mojito ?
questions.question_en: Which spirit is the base for a mojito?
questions.explanation_fr: Le mojito cubain est à base de rhum blanc, citron vert, menthe, sucre et eau gazeuse.
questions.explanation_en: The Cuban mojito is made with white rum, lime, mint, sugar, and soda water.

questions.question_fr: Quel ingrédient donne sa couleur jaune au safran ?
questions.question_en: Which spice gives saffron its yellow color?
questions.explanation_fr: Le safran provient des stigmates séchés du Crocus sativus. C'est l'épice la plus chère au monde.
questions.explanation_en: Saffron comes from the dried stigmas of Crocus sativus. It's the world's most expensive spice.

questions.question_fr: Le Roquefort est un fromage à pâte ___ (couleur).
questions.explanation_fr: Le Roquefort est un fromage à pâte persillée (bleu) au lait de brebis.
questions.explanation_en: Roquefort is a blue-veined cheese made from sheep's milk.

questions.question_fr: La tequila est obligatoirement fabriquée à partir d'agave bleu.
questions.question_en: Tequila must be made from blue agave.
questions.explanation_fr: L'AOC tequila exige au moins 51% d'agave bleu (Agave tequilana). 100% pour la 'pura'.
questions.explanation_en: Tequila DO requires at least 51% blue agave (Agave tequilana). 100% for 'pura'.

questions.question_fr: Quelle est la spécialité de la ville de Strasbourg ?
questions.question_en: What is the specialty of the city of Strasbourg?
questions.explanation_fr: La choucroute (chou fermenté + viandes) est emblématique de l'Alsace.
questions.explanation_en: Sauerkraut (fermented cabbage + meats) is iconic of Alsace.

questions.question_fr: Combien de fromages compte officiellement la France ?
questions.question_en: How many cheeses does France officially have?
questions.explanation_fr: La France compte plus de 1000 fromages, dont 46 sous AOC/AOP.
questions.explanation_en: France has over 1,000 cheeses, including 46 with AOC/AOP designation.

questions.question_fr: L'apéritif italien à base de Prosecco et Aperol s'appelle un ___.
questions.question_en: The Italian aperitif made with Prosecco and Aperol is called a ___.
questions.explanation_fr: Le Spritz Aperol : 3 parts Prosecco, 2 parts Aperol, 1 part eau gazeuse + tranche d'orange.
questions.explanation_en: Aperol Spritz: 3 parts Prosecco, 2 parts Aperol, 1 part soda + orange slice.
